purpose: Separate deterministic merge decisions from security-sensitive mutation orchestration.
success_outcome: Given source and actor context, backend logic selects one compatible target or transfer mode and produces an exact immutable plan without mutation.
anti_goals: Do not expose an HTTP route.
Do not mutate either cart or complete a journal.

forbidden_scope: storefront, checkout, order, inventory reservation, or payment behavior

success_checks: Compatible target selection is deterministic and actor-scoped.
Merge plan aggregates by Product Variant ID into sorted absolute quantities.
Planning causes no cart or journal-state mutation.
evidence_required: Typecheck and Memory Bank lint output.

stop_conditions: Medusa query data cannot prove ownership or compatibility.
Plan identity would require SKU display text.
A required public contract contradicts the linked specs.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify TASK-019 before manual or scheduler closure.
